reasoning: Emotional (60%): The orange/green palette is warm and somewhat Zelda-adjacent, but the bow silhouette is sharply diagonal and angular — not the round, friendly toy-diorama shape the brief demands. No yellows or pinks to reinforce the bright/charming Hyrule mood; the design reads more 'real weapon' than 'Zelda prop'. Score ~6/10 emotional. Technical (40%): Pixel execution is solid — 1px hard outlines visible across all zoom panels, hard 2-3 tone shading on the limbs (dark green core, mid orange, bright highlight), no anti-aliasing artifacts detected, pixel-grid-snapped geometry. Comparable discipline to Denzi reference sheet. Score ~7/10 technical. Weighted: 6×0.6 + 7×0.4 = 6.4 → 6. Needs rounder limb curves and warmer accent colors (yellow grip wrap, pink/gold string nock) to pass emotional axis.
